# Enhanced Food Company Website Project

## Project Overview
- **Frontend**: Nuxt.js 4.0 with Vue 3, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Laravel 11 with Sanctum authentication
- **Database**: SQL Server Express (migrated from MySQL)
- **Features**: Role-based authentication, brand/product CRUD, advanced search, career management, inventory system

## Architecture
- RESTful API design with Laravel backend
- JWT authentication using Laravel Sanctum
- Role-based access control (Admin/Normal User)
- Advanced parametric search functionality
- Career management with CV upload and tracking
- Comprehensive inventory management system

## Project Status
- [x] Project scaffolding initiated
- [x] Laravel backend setup with SQL Server Express
- [x] Nuxt frontend configuration
- [x] Basic authentication system implementation
- [x] Frontend components and layout created
- [x] Development servers running
- [ ] Database migrations and seeding
- [ ] Complete API endpoints
- [ ] Authentication system integration
- [ ] Role-based access control
- [ ] Brand and Product CRUD operations
- [ ] Advanced search functionality
- [ ] Career management system
- [ ] Inventory management system
- [ ] Testing and deployment

## Key Features
1. **Authentication & Authorization**
   - User registration/login with role assignment
   - Admin and normal user roles
   - JWT token-based authentication

2. **Brand Management**
   - CRUD operations for brands (Aprati, Frutati, Mocati)
   - Brand-specific product management
   - Hierarchical brand structure

3. **Product Management**
   - Advanced product CRUD with technical parameters
   - Parametric search by part numbers and specifications
   - Inventory tracking and management

4. **Career Management**
   - Job posting and application system
   - CV upload and management
   - Application tracking and notifications

5. **Advanced Search**
   - Full-text search capabilities
   - Filter by technical parameters
   - Real-time search suggestions

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Laravel 11, PHP 8.2+
- **Database**: SQL Server Express
- **Authentication**: Laravel Sanctum
- **File Storage**: Local storage with planned cloud integration
